biological_replicate: MI was induced in 10-wk-old male C57/BL6J mice
technical_replicate: The number of biological and technical replicates is indicated in figure legends
experimental_design: infarcted mice were injected with 1 million Cdx2-eGFP cells
factor_value: infarcted mice were injected with 1 million Cdx2-eGFP cells in phosphate-buffered saline (PBS)
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_technical_replicates: The number of biological and technical replicates is indicated in figure legends
number_of_biological_replicates: The text does not specify the number of mice used in the study
number_of_samples: The text does not specify the number of biological samples used in the study
